title: First Private Round Pool is live on Cryptool
content_html:
The first Private Round Pool on Cryptool is live.

What this pool offers:

  • Access to an exclusive early-stage investment opportunity
  • Open to all investors on the platform
  • Referral revenue for anyone who brings their community in
  • Easy investment tracking inside the Cryptool dApp

Slots are limited. Open the Raise section on the platform to view the pool and the full details.
author: Cryptool
